headline: PNC (PNC) Stock Looks Cheap On Fair Value But Fair On Earnings
summary: PNC Financial Services Group has returned 114.2% over the past three years, and the latest intrinsic value work using the Excess Returns model points to the stock trading at a discount to that estimate, while the broader valuation checks present a more mixed picture. The 114.2% three year return puts PNC Financial Services Group in focus for investors asking whether the recent gains are already pricing in much of the good news. Expansion projects such as the planned branch build out in...
